# Team Vacation Planner

> Free team vacation planning tool for teams up to 25 people. No login required. Supports 55 countries with public holidays from 2026 to 2035. Regional holidays for Spain, Germany, Switzerland, Australia, and Canada.

## What it does

Team Vacation Planner helps teams coordinate their time off. Team members add their vacation days on a shared calendar. The tool automatically shows public holidays for each person's country and region, detects scheduling overlaps, and provides visual dashboards to ensure adequate team coverage.

## Key features

- 12-month calendar view with drag-to-select date ranges
- Public holidays for 55 countries computed algorithmically
- Regional holidays for Spain (17 communities), Germany (16 states), Switzerland (6 cantons), Australia (6 states), Canada (4 provinces)
- PTO balance tracker with visual progress bar
- Working days counter per member
- Approval workflow mode for vacation requests
- Heatmap, Timeline/Gantt, Coverage Dashboard, Summary, Activity Log views
- iCal subscribe URL for Google Calendar and Outlook auto-sync
- Export to ICS, PDF, CSV, Excel XLSX, TSV
- Embeddable mini-widget for Notion, wikis, and TV screens
- QR code sharing for instant team join
- Smart vacation optimizer with bridge day suggestions
- Holiday clash detector
- Conflict alerts with configurable threshold
- 10 languages: English, French, German, Spanish, Portuguese, Romanian, Hungarian, Swedish, Italian, Bulgarian
- 3 themes: Light, Dark, Pink with Apple Liquid Glass design
- No accounts, no login, no passwords
- 24-month data retention with automatic cleanup

## URL

https://vacationplanner.team
